title: 10 best herbal teas for insomnia
description: Scutellaria lateriflora, also known as skullcap, teas helps with insomnia because it contains flavonoids and other compounds that promote relaxation and reduce anxiety. The tea's calming effects are attributed to its ability to inhibit the production of stress hormones, such as cortisol, allowing the body to relax and prepare for sleep.
